mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ProductInfo (ProductId, ProductName, ProductNo, Barcode, Spec, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt) VALUES
(#{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productNo}, #{item.barcode}, #{item.spec}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ProductName = IF(ProductId <=> VALUES(ProductId), VALUES(ProductName), ProductName), Barcode = IF(ProductId <=> VALUES(ProductId), VALUES(Barcode), Barcode), Spec = IF(ProductId <=> VALUES(ProductId), VALUES(Spec), Spec), UpdatedAt = IF(ProductId <=> VALUES(ProductId), VALUES(UpdatedAt), UpdatedAt)
